text: bereshit haya hadavar vehadavar haya et haelohim velohim haya hadavar
hu haya vereshit et haelohim
hakol niheya 'al-yado umibale'adayv lo niheya kal-asher niheya
bo hayu chayim vehachayim hayu or liveney haadam
vehaor heir bachshekh vehachshekh lo hisigo
vayehi ish shalucha meet haelohim ushemo yochanan
hu va le'edut leha'id 'al-haor lema'an yaaminu khulam 'al-yado
hu lo-haya haor ki im-leha'id 'al-haor
haor haamiti hameir lekhal-adam asher va el-ha'olam
ba'olam haya ve'al-yado niheya ha'olam veha'olam lo yeda'o
hu va beshelo vaasher-hema lo lo qibeluhu
vehameqabelim oto hamaaminim bishemo natan-'oz lamo liheyot banim lelohim
asher lo midam velo mechefets habasar af lo-mechefets gever noladu ki im-meelohim
vehadavar niheya vasar vayishekon betokhenu vanecheze khevodo kikhevod ben yachid leaviv rav-chesed veemet
veyochanan he'id 'alayv vayiqera lemor hine ze hu asher amareti haba acharay haya lefanay ki qodem-li haya
umimeloo laqachenu khulanu chesed 'al-chased
ki hatora nitena beyad-mshe vehachesed vehaemet bau 'al-yedey yeshu'a hamashicha
et haelohim lo-raa ish me'olam haben hayachid asher becheyq haav hu hodi'a

vehu hoda velo khichesh vayode lemor lo hamashicha ani

vayomeru elayv mi-ze ata lema'an nashiv et-sholecheynu davar mah-tomar lenafeshekha
vayomer ani qol qore vamidebar panu derekh yeho kaasher amar yesha'eyahu hanavi
vehasheluchim bau min-haperushim
vayishealuhu vayomeru elayv madu'a efo matebil ata im-eynekha hamashicha velo eliyahu velo hanavi
vaya'an otam yochanan vayomer anokhi matebil bamayim uvetokhakhem 'omed asher lo yeda'etem oto
hu haba acharay asher haya lefanay vaani neqalti mehatir sherokh ne'alayv
vezot hayeta beveyt oneya me'ever layareden asher yochanan matebil sham
vayehi mimacharat vayare yochanan et-yeshu'a ba elayv vayomar hine se haelohim hanose chatat ha'olam
ze hu asher amareti acharay yavo ish asher haya lefanay ki qodem-li haya
vaani lo yeda'etiv ki im-ba'avur yigale veyiserael bati ani litebol bamayim

vaani lo yeda'etiv vehasholecha oti litebol bamayim hu amar elay et asher-tiree harucha yoredet venacha 'alayv hine ze hu asher yitebol berucha haqodesh
vaani raiti vaa'ida ki ze hu ben-haelohim
vayehi mimachorat vayosef yochanan vaya'amod ve'imo shenayim mitalemidayv
vayabet el-yeshu'a vehu mitehalekh vayomar hine se haelohim
usheney talemidayv shame'u et-devaro vayelekhu achaaarey yeshu'a
vayifen yeshu'a acharayv vayare otam holekhim acharayv vayomer aleyhem mah-tevaqeshu vayomeru elayv rabi eyfo talin

hu matsa rishona et shime'on achiv vayomer elayv matsanu et-hamashicha
vayeviehu el-yeshu'a vayehi kehabit elayv yeshu'a vayomar shime'on ben-yochanan lekha yiqare keyfa vehu vivanit peteros
vayehi mimachorat vayoel yeshu'a latset hagalila vayimetsa et-pilipos vayomer elayv lekh acharay
ufilipos mibeyt-tsayeda 'ir anederay ufeteros
vayifega' pilipos et-netaneel vayomer elayv matsanu et asher katav mshe besefer hatora vehaneviim et-yeshu'a ben-yosef minetsaret
vayomer elayv netaneel haminetseret yetse tov vayomer elayv bo uree
vayare yeshu'a et-netaneel ba liqerato vayomer 'alayv hine veemet ben-yiserael asher eyn-bo remiya
vayomer elayv netaneel eykh yeda'etani vaya'an yeshu'a vayomer lo beterem qara lekha pilipos veata tachat hateena anokhi reitikha
vaya'an netaneel vayomer elayv rabi ata ben-elohim ata hu melekh yiserael
vaya'an yeshu'a vayomer elayv ya'an asher higadeti lekha ki-tachat hateena reitikha heemaneta hine gedolot meele tiree

veyeshu'a vetalemidayv gam-hem hayu min-haqeruim el-hachatuna
vayehi kaasher kala hayayin vatomer em yeshu'a elayv eyn lahem yayin

vatomer imo el-hamesharatim kal-asher yomar lakhem ta'aso
vesham shisha khadey-even 'arukhim kemishepat hayehudim letahoratam shetayim o-shalsh batim yakhil kal-echad
vayomer aleyhem yeshu'a maleu hakadim mayim vayemaleum 'ad-lema'ela
vayomer shaavu-na vehaviu el-rav hamesiba vayaviu
vayite'am rosh hamesiba et-hamayim asher nehefekhu leyayin velo yada' meayin hu vehamesharatim asher-shaavu et-hamayim yada'u vayiqera rosh-hamesiba el-hechatan
vayomer elayv kal-ish yiten barishona et-hayayin hatov veacharey shetotam lirevaya yiten lahem et-hagaru'a veaata tsafaneta hayayin hatov 'ad-'ata
zot reshit haotot asher 'asa yeshu'a beqana asher beerets hagalil vayegal et-kevodo vayaaminu vo talemidayv
vayehi achaery-khen vayered el-kefar-nachum hu veimo veechayv vetalemidayv velo arekhu lahem sham hayamim
vayiqerevu yemey chag-hapesach asher layehudim vaya'al yeshu'a yerushalayim
vayimetsa vamiqedash mokherey vaqar vatson uveney yona uforetey hakesef yshevim sham
vayiqach chavalim vaye'abetem leshot vayegaresh kulam min-hamiqedash veet hatson veet habaqar vayefazer et-me'ot hasulechanim vayahafokh shulechanoteyhem
veel-mokherey hayonim amar hotsiu ele mize veal-taa'aso et-beyt avi leveyt misechar
vayizekeru talemidayv et-hakatuv ki-qineat beytekha akhalateni
vaya'anu hayehudim vayomeru elayv ey-zo ot tareenu sheta'ase khazot
vaya'an yeshu'a vayomer aleyhem hiresu et-haheykhal haze uvishelsha yamim aqimenu
vayomeru hayehudim hine areba'im vashesh shana nivena haheykhal haze veata bishelsha yamim teqimenu
vehu diber 'al-heykhal geviyato
veacharey qumo min-hametim zakheru talemidayv ki-zot amar lahem vayaaminu vakatuv uvadavar asher-diber yeshu'a
vayehi biheyoto virushalayim bechag-hapesach vayaaminu rabim bishemo ki rau haotot asher 'asa
vehu yeshu'a lo heemin lahem 'al-asher yada' et-kulam
velo hitsetarekh le'edut ish 'al-haadam ki hu yada' mah-beqerev haadam
uvaperushim ish naqedimon shemo qetsin hayehudim
vayavo el-yeshu'a layela vayomer elayv rabi yada'enu ki ata more meet elohim bata ki lo-yukhal ish la'asot haotot asher ata 'ose bileti im-haelohim 'imo
vaya'an yeshu'a vayomer elayv amen amen ani omer lakh im-lo yivaled ish milema'ela lo-yukhal lireot et-malekhut haelohim
vayomer elayv naqedimon eykh yivaled adam vehu zaqen hayukhal lashuv el-beten imo veyivaled
vaya'an yeshu'a amen amen ani omer lakh im-lo yivaled ish min-hamayim veharucha lo-yukhal lavo el-malekhut haelohim
hanolad min-habasar basar hu vehanolad min-harucha rucha hu
al-titemah 'al-amery lakh ki 'aleykhem lehivaled milema'ela
harucha baasher yachepots sham hu nshev veata tishema' et-qolo velo teda' meayin ba veana hu holekh ken kal-hanolad min-harucha
vaya'an naqedimon vayomer elayv eykha tiheye kazot
vaya'an yeshu'a vayomer elayv rav beyiserael ata vezot lo yada'eta
amen amen ani omer lakh ki et asher-yada'enu nedaber veet asher-rainu na'id veatem lo teqabelu 'edutenu
im higadeti lakhem 'ineyeney haarets veeynekhem maaminim eykh taaminu behagidi lakhem 'ineyeney hashamayim
veish lo-'ala hashamayema bileti im-asher yarad min-hashamayim ben-haadam asher hu bashamayim
vekhaasher higebiha mshe et-hanachash bamidebar ken tsarikh ben-haadam lehinase
lema'an asher lo yovad kal-hamaamin bo ki im-yicheye chayey 'olam
ki-ahava raba ahav haelohim et-ha'olam 'ad-asher natan et-beno et-yechido lema'an asher lo-yovad kal-hamaamin bo ki im-yicheye chayey 'olam
ki haelohim lo-shalach et-beno ba'olam ladin et-ha'olam ki im-lema'an yivasha' bo ha'olam
hamaamin bo lo yidon vaasher lo-yaamin bo kevar nadon ki lo-heemin beshem ben-haelohim hayachid
veze hu hadin ki haor ba el-ha'olam uveney haadam ahavu hachshekh yoter min-haor ki ra'im ma'asheyhem
ki khal-po'el 'avela sone et-haor velo yavo laor pen-yivakhach 'al-ma'asayv
aval 'ose haemet yavo laor lema'an yigalu ma'asayv ki na'aso belohim
vayehi acharey hadevarim haele vayavo yeshu'a vetalemidayv el-erets yehuda vayeshev-sham 'imahem vayitebol
vegam yochanan haya tovel be'eynon qarov leshalem ki-sham hayu mayim larov vayavou vayitavelu
ki 'od lo-nitan yochanan el-beyt hasohar
vatehi machaloqet beyn talemidey yochanan uveyn yehudi 'al-devar hatahora
vayavou el-yochanan vayomeru elayv rabi haish asher haya 'imekha be'ever hayareden vaasher ha'idota lo hino tovel vekhulam baim elayv
vaya'an yochanan vayomar lo-yukhal ish laqachat davar bileti im-nitan-lo min-hashamayim
veatem 'eday asher amareti eyneni hamashicha raq-shalucha ani lefanayv
asher-lo hakala hu hechatan vere'a hechatan ha'omed veshome'a oto samocha yisemach leqol hechatan hine simechati zot 'ata shelema
hu yigedal halokh vegadel vaani echesar halokh vechasor
haba mima'al na'ale 'al-kol vaasher meerets meerets hu umeerets yedaber haba mishamayim na'ale 'al-kol
veet asher raa veshama' oto ya'id veeyn meqabel 'eduto
vaasher qibel 'eduto hu chatom chatam ki haelohim emet
ki asher shelacho elohim hu yedaber diverey elohim ki-lo vamida noten elohim et-harucha
haav ohev et-beno veet-kol natan beyado
kal-hamaamin baben yesh-lo chayey 'olam vaasher lo yaamin baben lo yiree chayim ki im-charon af elohim yishekon 'alayv

veulam yeshu'a hu lo hitebil ki im-talemidayv
vayetse meerets yehuda vayelekh shenit hagalila
vayehi la'avor derekh erets shomeron

ki talemidayv halekhu ha'ira liqenot okhel
vatomer elayv haisha hashomeronit hen yehudi ata veeykhakha tisheal mimeni lishetot veanokhi isha shomeronit ki-lo yite'arevu hayehudim 'im-hashomeronim

vaya'an yeshu'a vayomer eleyha kal-hashote min-hamayim haele yashuv veyitsema

ki be'alim chamisha hayu lakh vaasher 'ata lakh eynenu ba'elekh lakhen emet hadavar asher dibaret
vatomer elayv haisha adoni roa anokhi ki navi ata
avoteynu hishetachavu bahar haze veatem omerim yerushalayim hi hamaqom hanivechar lehishetachaot shama

ulam tavo sha'a ve'ata hi asher 'ovedey el haamitim yishetachavu laav berucha uveemet ki bemishetachavim kaele chafets haav

ze haot hasheni asher 'asa yeshu'a bevoo mihuda leerets hagalil
achar hadevarim haele haya chag layehudim vaya'al yeshu'a yerushalayim

ki maleakh yarad bemo'ado el-haberekha vayare'esh et-meymeyha vehaya hayored rishon el-tokhah acharey hitego'ashu hamayim hu nirepa mikal-machala asher daveqa bo
vesham ish echad vehu vechaleyo shelshim ushemone shana
vayare oto yeshu'a shokhev vayeda' ki arekhu-lo yemey chaleyo vayomer elayv hatachepots leherafe

vehanirepa lo yada' mi hu ki sar yeshu'a vayelekhe-lo ki haya hamon rav bamaqom hahu

ve'al-ken radefu hayehudim et-yeshu'a vayevaqeshu hamito ki-'asa ele bashabat

az yosifu hayehudim levaqesh et-nafesho ki milevad asher chilel et-hashabat gam amar ki haelohim hu aviv vayidame lelohim

ki kaasher haav ya'ir veychaye et-hametim ken gam-haben yechaye et-asher yechepats
ki haav lo-yadin ish ki im-natan hamishepat kulo beyad haben lema'an yekhabedu khulam et-haben kaasher yekhabedu et-haav
mi asher lo-yekhabed et-haben gam et-haav asher shelacho eynenu mekhabed

ki kaasher laav yesh chayim be'atsemo ken natan gam-laben liheyot-lo chayim be'atsemo

al-titemehu 'al-zot ki hine baa sha'a veyisheme'u kal-shokheney qever et-qolo
ve'alu 'osey hatov laqum lachayim ve'osey hara' laqum ladin
lo ukhal la'asot davar minafeshi kaasher eshema' ken eshepot umishepati tsedeq ki lo avaqesh retsoni ki im-retson haav asher shelachani
im-anokhi me'id 'alay 'eduti lo neemana
yesh acher hame'id 'alay veyada'eti ki neemana 'eduto asher-hu me'id 'alay
atem shelachetem el-yochanan vehu he'id 'edut emet
vaani lo eqach li 'edut meadam akh amareti zot lema'an tivashe'un
hu haya haner hadoleq vehameir veatem retsitem lasos kesha'a leoro
veli 'edut gedola me'edut yochanan hama'asim asher natan-li avi lehashelimam hama'asim haele asher-ani 'ose me'idim 'alay ki haav shelachani

udevaro eynenu shokhen beqirebekhem ki eynekhem maaminim lishelucho
direshu vaketavim asher tomeru sheyesh lakhem chayey 'olam bahem vehema hame'idim 'alay
veatem eynekhem rotsim lavo elay liheyot lakhem chayim
lo-eqach kavod mibeney adam
akhen yada'eti etekhem ki eyn-ahavat elohim beqirebekhem
ani hine vati beshem avi lo qibaletem oti veim-yavo acher beshem 'atsemo oto teqabelu
eykh tukhelu lehaamin atem halqechim kavod ish meet re'ehu veet-hakvod asher meet-haelohim hayachid lo tevaqeshu

ki lu taaminu lemshe gam-li taaminu ki hu katav 'alay
veim-likhetavayv eynekhem maaminim eykh taaminu lidevaray

vehaya ki-yavo vehokhicha et-ha'olam 'al-devar hachete vehatsedeq vehamishepat
'al-hachete ki lo-heeminu vi
ve'al-hatsedeq ki elekh el-avi velo tosifu lireot oti
ve'al-hamishepat ki nidon sar ha'olam haze
'od rabot li lehagid lakhem akh lo-tukhelun seet 'ata
verucha haemet bevoo hu yaderikh etekhem el-haemet kulah ki lo yedaber me'atsemo ki im-asher yishema' yedaber vehaotiot yagid lakhem

kol asher leavi li hu 'al-ken amareti ki misheli yiqach veyagid lakhem

vayeda' yeshu'a ki 'im-levavam lisheol oto vayomer aleyhem ha'al hadavar haze tidereshu ze et-ze ki amareti hen-me'at velo tireuni ve'od-me'at vetechezuni

'ad-'ata lo-sheeletem davar bishemi shaalu vetiqechu lema'an timale simechatekhem

meet haav yatsati vaavo la'olam ashuva asur min-ha'olam veelekh el-avi

hine sha'a vaa ve'ata ze higi'a unefotsotem ish leveyto veoti ta'azevu levadi veeyneni levadi ki avi 'imadi

ani pearetikha vaarets kiliti melakhetekha asher tsivitani la'asot

ki hadevarim asher natata li natati lahem vehem qibelum vayakiru veemet ki me'imakha yatsati vayaaminu ki ata shelachetani
